memory.summary: The room's odor and clutter are severely disrupting my focus, but my roommate is friendly and leaving soon. Moving to the library now could restore my concentration.
Roommate_R apologized and promised to clean immediately. This resolves the conflict, so I can now focus on my studies without distraction.
Moving to the library improves focus but won't fix sleep disruption if I don't raise the odor issue tonight.
Moving to the library successfully restored my focus after the room's disruption. This confirms that relocating is an effective immediate strategy for concentration.
